Command Example
file file=00112233445566778899aabbccddeeff
4. Get related entities of an observable
Returns related entities of a single observable.
Base Command
eclecticiq-get-observable-related-entity
Input
Argument Name

Command Example
eclecticiq-get-observable-related-entity observable_id=63
Context Example
{
"EclecticIQ.Entity": [
{
"HalfLife": "30 Days",
"Title": "Indicator containing malicious file hashes",
name: eclecticiq-get-observable-related-entity

outputs.description: EclecticIQ.Entity.EstimatedStartTime Date Entity estimated start time
outputs.name: Entity estimated observed time

outputs.description: Is entity in the community feed EclecticIQ.Entity.Exposure.Detection Is entity detected
outputs.name: EclecticIQ.Entity.Exposure.Community

outputs.description: Is entity exposed EclecticIQ.Entity.Exposure.Prevention Is entity in prevented feed
outputs.name: EclecticIQ.Entity.Exposure.Exposed

outputs.description: Is entity sighted EclecticIQ.Entity.HalfLife The time it takes an entity to decay in intelligence value, expressed in the number of days until a 50% decay
outputs.name: EclecticIQ.Entity.Exposure.Sighting

outputs.description: Entity ID EclecticIQ.Entity.Source.Name Entity source name
outputs.name: EclecticIQ.Entity.ID

outputs.description: Entity source reliability EclecticIQ.Entity.Title Entity title
outputs.name: EclecticIQ.Entity.Source.Reliability
